transcript_title: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D25 Mission Report Greece January 2024
text: AT 0109Z, CONDUCTED SLR TAKE OFF FROM LGLR. PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a AT 0509Z, OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENON (SEE UAP 1). AT 0135Z, WAS 7-LINED TO SUPPORT (b)(1)1.4a ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 0635Z, CHECKED IN WITH AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 36R XV 19 63 (SEE ISR 1). AT 1504Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 2149Z, LANDED AT LGLR. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY GET. 20:40 MISSION HOURS, 08:29 FMV HOURS, 1X FMV TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 08:27 SIGINT HOURS, 1X SIGINT TASKINGS. text: Location (ICAO Code): LGLR ¢ Takeoff Time DTG: 250109:00ZJAN24 ¢ Mode 3 (IFF Codes): 4055 ¢ Gentext/Additional Details: ¢ Mission Canceled: Landing ¢ Last Land Location (ICAO Code): LGLR ¢ Last Land Time: 252149:00ZJAN24 ¢ Last Engine Shutdown Time: 252159:00ZJAN24 ¢ Total Mission Time: 20 hours 40 minutes Gentext/Additional Details: On Station ¢ Time On Station DTG: 250635:00ZJAN24 Callsign: (6)(1)1.4a JTAR Number: - Killbox (Location): - ¢ Mission Type: ISR JTAC Callsign: (6)(1)1.4a Gentext/Additional Details: Did not Arrive On Station: | 3.5c, FOIA Exemption (b)(6) USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 004 Off Station - Time Off Station DTG: 251504:00ZJAN24 - Total Time On Station: 8 hours 29 minutes - Gentext/Additional Details: ISR - Time-on Station DTG: 250635:00ZJAN24 - Time-off Station DTG: 251504:00ZJAN24 - Aircraft Callsign: - Msn Type: AREC - Primary Sensor: FMV - Sensors Available: BLASPHEMY - Tasking Type: Planned - Tasking or Request Number (JTAR#, AEM#, PRI#, or TIC#): DATA MASKED - BE Number (if NTISR): - - Tasked Start Point: 36RXV19 3 - Activity Description: ISR - FMV or Image File Name (if NTISR): - - EEIs Observed: Yes - Number of EEIs: 1 - Global Campaign Plan: GENTEXT/ISR - Gentext: (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) UPON ARRIVAL TO THE SP AT 0635Z, OBSERVED NO EEI RELATED ACTIVITY. FROM 0635Z- 1353Z, CONDUCTED POL AND OBSERVED NSTR. FROM 1353Z-1500Z, CONDUCTED A 1X STOP FOLLOW ON 1X ADM IN A SILVER SUV. AT 1400Z, OBSERVED A LARGE WHITE BOX BEING TRANSFERRED FROM BLACK SUV TO WHITE VAN. transcript_title: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D25 Mission Report Greece January 2024
text: - UAP Effects on Persons: NO - UAP Objects/Material Recovered (yes/no; if yes, describe): NO - UAP Effects on Equipment: NONE USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 006 - Rank/Grade: SENIOR AIRMAN/E-4 - Phone Number (VOSIP/STE): - Observer Engagement of UAP (yes/no; if yes, describe): NONE - First Coordinate: 35SQT44 7 - First Seen Radius: 20 - Last Accuracy: Estimated - Last Coordinate: 35SPT63 5 - Last Seen Radius: 20 - Kinetic Altitude Accuracy: Estimated - Kinetic Altitude: FL200 - Kinetic Depth Accuracy: Estimated - Kinetic Depth: - - Kinetic Velocity Accuracy: Estimated - Kinetic Velocity: - Kinetic Trajectory Accuracy: Estimated - Kinetic Trajectory: W - UAP Date of DoD Acquisition: 250509:00ZJAN24 - UAP Reaction to Observation, Interrogation, Engagement (yes/no; if yes, describe): NO - UAP Anomalous Characteristics/ Behaviors: MAINTAINED STEADY FLIGHT PATH, INCREASED AND DECREASED ALTITUDE PROFILE, DID NOT CHANGE TRAJECTORY - First Accuracy: Estimated - Call Sign: - UAP First Seen Location: - UAP Last Seen Location: - UAP Altitude, Depth, Velocity, and Trajectory (indicate estimated or measured): GENTEXT/UAP - UAP Description (e.g., size, shape, color, markings, recognizable features): ROUND DIAMOND SHAPE WITH STRAIGHT, NON MANUEVERABLE "TAIL" - Gentext (UAP Event Description): (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) AT 0509Z, OBSERVED 1X UAP WHILE IN TRANSIT. UPON INITIAL OBSERVATION, THE UAP WAS FLYING AT A SPEED OF APPROX 434 KNOTS. THE UAP APPEARED DIAMOND IN SHAPE WITH A NON-MANUEVERING PROBE AT THE BOTTOM. THE UAP ONLY APPEARED ON THE SWIR CAMERA. THE EVENT LASTED APPROX 2 MINUTES ENDING AT 0511Z, WITHOUT ANY OTHER INCIDENT OCCURING. USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S 10/28/25 007
